# Inner Peace  In-Home Nursing & Care

_Personalised Care, in the Comfort of Your Own Home_

At Inner Peace In-Home Nursing & Care, we are committed to providing high-quality, personalised care that promotes well-being and health.

[Learn more](https://innerpeace.vision/#learn-more)

[Book Now](https://innerpeace.vision/book-an-appointment/)

## About Inner Peace In-Home Nursing & Care

At Inner Peace In-Home Nursing & Care, we are committed to providing high-quality, [personalised care](https://innerpeace.vision/home-care-services/personal-care/) that promotes well-being and health. We don’t just deliver exceptional in-home care; we make sure that we create opportunities that enrich lives.

Ever since 2022, Inner Peace In-Home Nursing & Care has been dedicated to enhancing the lives of our happy clients in the tranquil East Gippsland area.

Our approach goes beyond the confines of traditional residential care, empowering individuals and their families to embrace a fulfilling life within the comfort of their home.

We believe in the significance of cherishing life’s simple pleasures, whether it’s a refreshing day at the local pool, hosting a social gathering, or exploring hidden treasures at the op shop.

### OUR SERVICES

![Personal Care](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/Personal-Care.webp)

#### Personal Care

Providing exceptional support in your daily life, ensuring that you can live independently and comfortably in your own home.

[Learn More](https://innerpeace.vision/in-home-nursing-care-services/personal-care/)

![Social Care](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/Social-Care.webp)

#### Social Care

Offering personalized in-home support and social activities tailored to bring joy and excitement into your life.

[Learn More](https://innerpeace.vision/in-home-nursing-care-services/social-care/)

![Nursing Care](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/Nursing-Care.webp)

#### Nursing Care

Encompasses a wide range of specialized and personalized support to ensure your holistic well-being.

[Learn More](https://innerpeace.vision/in-home-nursing-care-services/nursing-care/)

![Dementia_Nurse_Consulting](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/Dementia_Nurse_Consulting-rnn0ad8eyvrwfnq9thpasqe5t4t6m03r5r6cbnihlq.png)

#### Dementia Care

Compassionate, personalised support for people living with dementia, their families, carers, and care providers across East Gippsland.

[Learn More](https://innerpeace.vision/dementia-care/)

### SELECTING YOUR CARERS

![Inner Peace Vision Team Members](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/team-members.jpg)

## Personalised Care

At Inner Peace In-Home Nursing & Care, we recognize that our place is within your home. Therefore, we meticulously select each carer, ensuring a personalized match between the carer and the individual’s need. Our selection process takes into account various factors such as personality, required medical attention, and other specific preferences that you may request.

## Team of Qualified Carers

All our carers hold a minimum Certificate III in Aged/Community Care qualification, as well as essential certifications in CPR and First Aid. Moreover, to be a part of the team, they must be capable, resilient, motivated, determined, joyful, empathetic, enthusiastic, compassionate, open-minded, professional, experienced, contemporary, and knowledgeable. We believe that these traits are essential in providing the highest standard of care to our clients.

## Safety is Our Priority

Furthermore, we prioritize the safety and well-being of our clients and our caregivers by providing comprehensive carer insurances, including public liability, professional indemnity, and work cover. These additional measures reflect our commitment to delivering quality care while maintaining a secure environment for everyone involved.

[Book an appointment](https://innerpeace.vision/book-an-appointment/)

### OUR CLIENT'S REVIEWS

Very happy with the service and the compassion shown to me. I enjoy the social support outings very much and the home care assistance is wonderful.
Thank you

1

I don’t usually leave feedback but in this case I feel compelled to do so and it’s positive. I have been needing extra assistance to be able to stay living in my own home. “Inner Peace” I know, definitely helped me achieve this goal. The in-home nursing/domestic assistance and social support outings that Inner Peace provide have really helped me escape bouts of depression and improved my physical and emotional well-being

2

Very happy with this service

3
